original_statement: "Spain are the most likely winners of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, winning the tournament in 16.1% of the 10,000 pre-tournament simulations by the Opta supercomputer."
statement_context: Excerpt from Opta supercomputer tournament simulation analysis published by The Analyst on 2026-06-01. Author Dan Edwards using 10,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: Spain wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by lifting the official trophy in the final match on or before 2026-07-19 according to FIFA.
source_text_snippet: Spain are the most likely winners of the 2026 World Cup, winning the tournament in 16.1% of the 10,000 pre-tournament simulations by the Opta supercomputer. ... Spain’s quality is highlighted by being the only team rated as more likely than not to reach the quarter-finals...
